sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69907" key="nauti/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ναυτίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, fem. of <sense id="n69907.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ναύτης, γυναῖκες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:79" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">79</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
